definitions.text: To make (someone) aware of (something impending); especially: To make (someone) aware of impending danger, evil, etc. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: We waved a flag to warn the oncoming traffic about the accident.
I phoned to warn him of the road closure.

definitions.text: To make (someone) aware of impending danger, evil, etc. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: We waved a flag to warn the oncoming traffic about the accident.
I phoned to warn him of the road closure.

definitions.text: To notify or inform (someone, about something).
examples: I warned him he'd be getting a huge box of birthday presents from me.
